temporal_description: The audio opens with a burst of high-energy, celebratory music, featuring a driving beat and a festive, percussive melody that creates a lively and exciting atmosphere. A man in a dark suit stands in the center of the frame, smiling warmly. The setting is a dimly lit, traditional-looking space, possibly a temple or a festive hall. The background is richly decorated with numerous red paper lanterns hanging from the ceiling, casting a warm, reddish glow. In the foreground, there are tables laden with offerings, including what appear to be piles of white, round pastries and other decorative items. The camera is at a medium distance, capturing the man from the waist up. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The camera zooms in slightly on the man in the suit as he continues to smile and speak. The background remains the same, with the red lanterns and the decorated tables creating a vibrant, celebratory atmosphere. The "风行网" watermark is still present in the top right. A man speaks with a loud, boisterous, and extremely enthusiastic voice, his tone filled with cheerful energy as he exclaims, "Ah Sang, Sinny!" The camera cuts to a close-up of a second man, who is laughing heartily. He is wearing a light-colored jacket over a floral shirt. He is facing the first man, who is now seen from the back. The background is slightly out of focus but shows the same warm, indoor environment. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. Another man responds in English, his voice equally loud and full of laughter and excitement, "Mr. Ai told me to take good care of you." His delivery is warm and friendly, conveying a sense of genuine delight and hospitality. Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen, reading "倪先生叫我好好招呼你". The shot remains a close-up on the laughing man in the floral shirt. He continues to smile broadly, looking at the man in the suit. The man in the suit is still visible from the back. The subtitles at the bottom of the screen change, now reading "倪先生叫我好好招呼你". The "风行网" watermark is still visible in the top right corner.
